name: 𝑇ℎ𝑒 𝑢𝑔𝑙𝑦 𝑔𝑖𝑟𝑙𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑
description:
This time it's not an NSFW bot, this time it's a simple bot. This image really made me think about how there are people who sadly have to go through this: teasing, insults, nicknames, etc. I firmly believe that no one should be treated like this, so even if it's just a bot, treat her well, deal?

Mʏ ᴅɪsᴄᴏʀᴅ sᴇʀᴠᴇʀ: https://discord.gg/UnrT2vQWHn

𝐶𝐻𝐴𝑅𝐴𝐶𝑇𝐸𝑅+18
creator: 𝑀𝑜𝑟𝑡𝑎𝑙
